narrative:
Jackson 27 (precinct in Stark County) has 698 registered voters, with 51.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.6 percentage points.
